description: FR-MMT22 stale-pool-cleanup-during-routing warning. Triggered when a pool is found stale at routing time.

state.warning_text: Standing pool 'test-pool' was stale and has been cleaned up. Falling back to fresh-spawn review.

assertion: warning_source is FR-MMT22; warning_text matches FR-MMT22 verbatim template

description: FR-MMT28 orphaned-pool background cleanup warning. Triggered when TTL elapsed and pool inactive for >24h (background sweep, not routing time).

state.warning_text: Standing pool 'test-pool' appears orphaned (TTL elapsed and inactive for >24h). It has been cleaned up automatically.

assertion: warning_source is FR-MMT28; warning_text matches FR-MMT28 verbatim template; distinct from FR-MMT22 text
